name: diagGetParameterLongName, diagGetRespParameterLongName
title: diagGetParameterLongName, diagGetRespParameterLongName
description: Copies the long name of a diagnostic parameter into the buffer, honoring the character encoding configured in the diagnostic description. The text is converted into the encoding used in the CAPL program.
There are two ways to identify the parameter:
return: Length of path written to buffer, may be truncated.
